aboutProjectDescription.message: Simple Bookmarks Manager focuses on local bookmark organization, efficient folder browsing, and a familiar desktop-style management workflow inside Chromium-based browsers.

aboutDesignGoalFastLocal.message: Fast local bookmark browsing and editing.

aboutDesignGoalNoRemote.message: Clear controls without remote services or accounts.

aboutPrivacyDescription.message: SBM is designed to run purely locally. It does not send bookmark data, telemetry, pings, or any other usage data to remote services.

advancedDetailsHelp.message: Configure advanced metadata viewing and supported advanced editing in the Details pane.

allowKeyboardDelete.message: Allow Delete key to delete selected items

allowKeyboardDeleteHelp.message: When disabled, the Delete key no longer deletes selected bookmark entries.

appDescription.message: A simple local bookmarks manager for Chromium browsers, inspired by Firefox Places, Firefox’s bookmark management system.

chooseSortModeTitle.message: Choose the middle-pane sort mode. Default uses Chromium’s folder order.

debugOptionsHelp.message: Advanced. Shows debug-only test controls. Leave disabled during normal use.

debugSettingsHelp.message: Controls shown only when Debug options is enabled.

doubleClickExpandCollapseTitle.message: Double-click to expand or collapse this folder

dragItemTitle.message: Drag to move or reorder this item

emptyDetails.message: Select one item, or select a folder to show its contents.

enableAdvancedEditingHelp.message: Allow supported advanced editing, currently limited to bookmark index changes.

enableAdvancedViewingHelp.message: Show read-only advanced bookmark metadata in the Details pane.

folderContentsViewHelp.message: Configure middle-pane column widths and optional columns. Name and URL are always shown.

fontHelp.message: Controls the main font family used by the bookmark manager UI.

fontSizeHelp.message: Base text size. Headings and column labels scale relative to this value.

fontSpacingHelp.message: Line spacing multiplier for denser or more readable rows and labels.

helpTagline.message: A practical guide to using SBM for local bookmark browsing, editing, sorting, and organization.

helpQuickStartIntro.message: Open SBM from the browser toolbar button. The manager opens as a normal extension page and works directly with Chromium's existing bookmark tree.

helpLibraryPaneDescription.message: browse bookmark folders and expand or collapse subfolders.

helpFolderContentsPaneDescription.message: view, select, sort, open, drag, and manage items in the selected folder.

helpDetailsPaneDescription.message: inspect and edit the selected bookmark or folder.

helpBasicUseNewButtonsAfter.message: to add items to the current folder.

helpBasicRightClickActions.message: Right-click folders or bookmarks for actions such as rename, edit, delete, cut, copy, paste, sort, and open.

helpBasicDragDrop.message: Use drag-and-drop to reorder items or move bookmarks and folders into another folder.

helpBasicDetailsPaneEdits.message: Use the Details pane to change bookmark names, URLs, parent folders, and supported advanced fields.

helpBasicF2After.message: to rename the active folder or edit the active bookmark.

helpBasicMiddleClick.message: Middle-click a bookmark in the Folder Contents pane to open it in a new tab.

helpSearchBox.message: Use the search box to search bookmarks by name or URL.

helpSearchLimitAfter.message: to search only inside the current folder tree.

helpVisualSort.message: Use the visual sort dropdown or column headers for temporary sorting in the Folder Contents pane.

helpPermanentSort.message: Use right-click permanent sorting when you want Chromium's saved bookmark order changed.

helpSeparatorsBeforeTitle.message: SBM supports a Chromium-compatible separator convention. A separator is stored as a bookmark with the title

helpSeparatorsAfterUrl.message: SBM renders that convention as a visual divider.

helpShortcutEnterDescription.message: open a bookmark or navigate into a folder.

helpShortcutBackspaceDescription.message: move up one folder level when available.

helpShortcutF2Description.message: rename the active folder or edit the active bookmark.

helpShortcutDeleteDescription.message: delete the selected item when keyboard deletion is enabled.

helpShortcutEscapeDescription.message: close open SBM dialogs or menus.

helpPinningHeading.message: Pinning Simple Bookmarks Manager for easy access

helpPinningIntro.message: Pinning Simple Bookmarks Manager (SBM) to the toolbar allows faster and easier access to the extension.

helpPinningIntro2.message: Once SBM is installed in your Chromium-based browser, you can pin it to the toolbar in one of the following ways:

helpPinViaExtensionsMenuStep1.message: Click the Extensions button, usually located to the right of the address bar.

helpPinIconBefore.message: Click the pin icon next to

helpPinToggleExplanation.message: This will pin SBM to the toolbar. If SBM is already pinned, clicking the pin icon will unpin it.

helpPinViaManageExtensionsHeading.message: 2. Pin via the Manage Extensions page

helpPinViaManageExtensionsStep1.message: Click the Extensions button, usually located to the right of the address bar.

helpOnceExtensionsPageOpen.message: Once the Extensions page is open:

helpOptionsReferenceBeforeStorage.message: The Options page stores persistent settings in

helpOptionsReferenceAfterStorage.message: These settings stay local to the browser profile.

helpOptionUserInterfaceLanguageDescripti.message: : choose automatic language detection or a specific SBM UI language.

helpOptionThemeDescription.message: : choose the visual theme used by SBM.

helpOptionDetailsPanePositionDescription.message: : place the Details pane on the right side or below the Folder Contents pane.

helpOptionFontDescription.message: : choose one of the supported font families.

helpOptionFontSizeDescription.message: : adjust the base UI text size.

helpOptionFontSpacingDescription.message: : adjust the line spacing used by labels and rows.

helpOptionLimitSearchDescription.message: changes the main search box from searching all bookmarks to searching only within the current folder tree.

helpOptionShowDeleteWarningDescription.message: : asks before deleting bookmark items or folders.

helpOptionShowSortWarningDescription.message: : asks before applying permanent context-menu sorting.

helpOptionAllowKeyboardDeleteDescription.message: : controls whether the keyboard Delete key can remove selected items.

helpOptionNaturalSortDescription.message: controls the order used by permanent Sort by Name operations. When enabled, folders are placed first, separators next, then bookmarks.

helpOptionMultipleInstancesDescription.message: : when disabled, clicking the extension button focuses the existing SBM tab instead of opening a new one.

helpOptionStartAtFolderDescription.message: : opens SBM at a selected bookmark folder when launched.

helpOptionStartupFolderDescription.message: : selects the folder used by the chosen-folder startup option.

helpOptionUrlProtectionsDescription.message: These options control protections for higher-risk bookmark URL schemes when SBM opens bookmarks through extension tab or window actions. They do not prevent saving bookmarks.

helpOptionLibraryPaneWidthDescription.message: : width in pixels for the left Library pane.

helpOptionDetailsPaneWidthDescription.message: : width in pixels for the right-side Details pane.

helpOptionBottomDetailsHeightDescription.message: : height in pixels for the bottom Details pane.

helpOptionPaneResizeBars.message: Pane sizes can also be changed by dragging the visible pane resize bars.

helpOptionFolderContentsDescription.message: These options configure the optional columns and saved column widths in the middle Folder Contents pane. Name and URL are always shown.

helpOptionDateAddedColumnDescription.message: : optional column showing when an item was added.

helpOptionIdColumnDescription.message: : optional column showing Chromium bookmark IDs.

helpOptionOrderColumnDescription.message: : optional column showing Chromium folder order/index values.

helpOptionAdvancedDetailsViewDescription.message: : shows read-only advanced bookmark metadata in the Details pane.

helpOptionAdvancedDetailsEditDescription.message: : allows supported advanced editing, currently limited to bookmark index changes.

helpOptionOptimisationsDescription.message: These options are mainly for benchmarking and troubleshooting. Leave them enabled unless you are comparing performance or diagnosing a rendering issue.

helpOptionDomRenderingDescription.message: : reduces selected DOM churn in rendering paths.

helpOptionTempTreeMapsDescription.message: : builds short-lived lookup maps during some tree operations, then discards them.

helpOptionDebugSettingsAfter.message: is enabled. The warnings/errors log is transient and is not saved to extension settings.

leftLibWidthHelp.message: Width in pixels for the left Library pane.

midFcShowDateAddedHelp.message: Show or hide the Date Added column in the Folder Contents pane.

midFcShowIdHelp.message: Show or hide the Chromium bookmark ID column.

midFcShowOrderHelp.message: Show or hide the Chromium folder order/index column.

midFcWidthDateAddedHelp.message: Width in pixels for the optional Date Added column.

midFcWidthIdHelp.message: Width in pixels for the optional ID column.

midFcWidthNameHelp.message: Width in pixels for the Folder Contents Name column.

midFcWidthOrderHelp.message: Width in pixels for the optional Chromium order/index column.

midFcWidthUrlHelp.message: Width in pixels for the Folder Contents URL column.

multipleInstancesAllowedHelp.message: When disabled, clicking the extension button focuses the existing Simple Bookmarks Manager tab instead of opening another one.

startupBehaviorHelp.message: Choose where Simple Bookmarks Manager opens when launched.

startAtConfiguredBookmarkFolderHelp.message: When enabled, SBM opens at the selected bookmark folder. If the folder no longer exists, this setting is cleared and SBM uses its normal startup folder.

startupBookmarkFolderHelp.message: Select the existing bookmark folder to show when SBM starts.

naturalSortHelp.message: Permanent Sort by Name places folders first, separators next, then bookmarks.

openAllInNewTabGroup.message: Open All in New Tab Group

optimisationDOMrenderingHelp.message: Experimental. Enables reduced DOM churn for selected rendering, drag/drop indicators, and row icon handling. Disable only when comparing performance or troubleshooting UI behavior.

optimisationTempBookmarkTreeMapsHelp.message: Experimental. Builds short-lived lookup maps during some render/search/tree operations, then discards them to avoid a persistent stale cache.

optimisationsHelp.message: Experimental performance options for benchmarking and troubleshooting.

paneWidthsHelp.message: Configure the Library and Details pane widths. These are also updated when panes are resized in the manager UI.

rightDetailsWidthHelp.message: Width in pixels for the right Details pane.

bottomDetailsHeightHelp.message: Height in pixels used when the Details pane position is set to Bottom.

searchLimitFull.message: Limit Search to Current Folder & Subfolders

searchLimitOptionHelp.message: When enabled, the main search box searches only inside the current visible folder tree.

searchLimitTitle.message: When enabled, search only the current folder and its subfolders. When disabled, search all bookmarks.

showDeleteWarningHelp.message: Ask before deleting bookmark items or folders.

showErrorsWarningsHelp.message: Advanced. Shows a transient in-memory log for this SBM session. Log entries are not saved to extension settings.

showSortWarningHelp.message: Ask before applying context-menu sorts that permanently reorder a bookmark folder.

sortDateAscTooltip.message: Sort by date added: oldest first

sortDateDescTooltip.message: Sort by date added: newest first

sortDefaultTooltip.message: Default Chromium folder order. Click to return to Default sorting; this column does not reverse-sort.

sortFolderConfirm.message:
Sort "{folderName}" by {sortName}?

This permanently changes the saved bookmark order in Chromium. It is different from the temporary Visual sort dropdown.

sortNameAscTooltip.message: Sort by name: A to Z

sortNameDescTooltip.message: Sort by name: Z to A

sortSelectDateAddedTitle.message: Date added sort. Ascending is oldest first; descending is newest first.

sortSelectIdTitle.message: ID sort. Ascending is lowest first; descending is highest first.

sortSelectTitleTitle.message: Name sort. Ascending is A to Z; descending is Z to A.

sortSelectUrlTitle.message: URL sort. Ascending is A to Z; descending is Z to A.

sortUrlAscTooltip.message: Sort by URL: A to Z

sortUrlDescTooltip.message: Sort by URL: Z to A

unsavedChangesMessage.message: The Details pane has unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

urlWarningControlCharacters.message: URL contained hidden control characters; they will be removed before saving.

urlWarningEmpty.message: URL is empty. Chrome may reject this bookmark until a URL is provided.

urlWarningInvalidBlocked.message: This URL is not valid enough to save as a bookmark. Fix the URL before saving.

urlWarningInvalidButAllowed.message: This URL is not valid enough to save as a bookmark. Fix the URL before saving.

urlWarningWhitespace.message: URL contains whitespace. It will be saved if Chrome accepts it, but it may not open as expected.

userInterfaceLanguageHelp.message: Automatic follows the browser UI language. Manual choices affect the manager and options pages.

themeHelp.message: Set the theme used by Simple Bookmarks Manager.

detailsPanePositionHelp.message: Choose whether the Details pane appears on the right side or below the Folder Contents pane.

warningsErrorsLogEmpty.message: No warnings or errors recorded for this session.

warningsErrorsLogHelp.message: Transient warnings/errors for this current SBM session. This is not saved to settings.

bookmarkUrlProtectionsHelp.message: Control protections for higher-risk bookmark URL schemes. These protections affect opening bookmarks only, not saving them.

blockJavascriptBookmarkOpensHelp.message: Recommended. Prevents SBM from opening bookmarklets or other javascript: URLs through extension tab/window actions.

blockDataBookmarkOpensHelp.message: Recommended. Prevents SBM from opening inline data: documents through extension tab/window actions.

blockBlobBookmarkOpensHelp.message: Recommended. Prevents SBM from opening blob: URLs through extension tab/window actions.

urlOpenBlockedByProtection.message: This bookmark URL is blocked by an advanced URL-opening protection. You can review the protection toggles in Options > Advanced.
